hooks.command: cd C:/Users/trust/teardown-mp-patches && python -m tools.status 2>&1 || echo 'tools.status failed - run manually'

node -e "var i;try{i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'))}catch(e){process.exit(0)}var p=(i.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(/Documents[\\\/]Teardown[\\\/]mods/i.test(p)){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Do NOT edit in Documents/Teardown/mods/ — use C:/Program Files (x86)/Steam/steamapps/common/Teardown/mods/');process.exit(2)}"
